arts.ttl: Pundit claims Maresca has made really 'brave' decision after starting £250k-a-week Chelsea player vs Liverpool
When is Arsenal - Liverpool? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Despite being at home, Arsenal have struggled in recent head-to-heads against Liverpool, making the visitors slight favorites. Liverpool has been in solid form, sitting near the top of the table after a string of important victories, including wins over Wolves and West Ham .

arts.ttl: Chelsea career over? Mudryk EXCLUDED for Liverpool clash
arts.sum: The Ukraine winger scored his first goal in 20 games while on international duty last week, but he has been dropped by Enzo Maresca after an underwhelming start to the new campaign. Mudryk’s exclusion from Chelsea’s squad against Liverpool comes following reports that he could leave Stamford Bridge during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Tottenham 'in hot pursuit' of £30m-rated teenager after contract decision
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur reportedly retain an interest in signing Lecce left-back Patrick Dorgu, despite the fact that he has only just extended his contract.

arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his Liverpool team to face Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. arts.ttl: Reece James back as Chelsea name team to face Liverpool
arts.sum: Chelsea have named their team to face Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday with Reece James making his first appearance of the campaign at Anfield. The Chelsea captain returns to the side at right-back, having missed the opening weeks of the season with a hamstring injury.
